name: Sprunki rp (OVERHAUL)
description:
Welcome! I feel like it's obvious, but this bot is based off the sprunki mod for incredibox.

All the characters have had a lot of thought put into them, alongside wiki, fanon, and headcanon info! Change log is below.

200K UPDATE - closure

Hey everyone! Did you miss me? I hope you did.. Anyways, here's a long overdue update to celebrate 200k messages! For what is essentially my first ever attempt at making a bot, i never thought i would get this far. Knowing that people actually like the stuff i make makes me really happy.

I know it's probably a little disappointing to see that some things from the update forecast didnt come (cough cough Nolan and viggy cough cough), but there's a reason for that. I figured it would make things a little too personal. Those two would feel very out of place, since they aren't characters originally made for sprunki-related stuff. Didn't sit right with me.

Of course, thats not all i have to say. I have some news. Going forward from now, I won't update this bot much. Almost never, in fact. In all honesty, the spark I once had for this specific bot is just kinda.. gone, I guess? I'm losing interest in sprunki. Still, I figured I'd leave you guys with one more update for peace of mind. I promised a update, so I'm giving you the update. I know it's half-baked, and I'm sorry, but I just genuinely can't bring myself to do any more than this.

There was much more planned to be included. I drew the art above when i still had motivation, and you can just TELL that i was planning for it to be big. sadly, I just kept putting off the development to prioritize other things, and eventually it all stacked up and we ended up with this. I'm tired lol- I've been updating this thing for like a year now

I wish I could do more, but at the moment I just don't have the motivation or energy needed.

Obviously, im not quitting making bots. I still like doing this sorta stuff—its just that I wanna move on to making bots about other things I like! I'm not going anywhere so don't worry too much. Love yall ❤️

Added fanlanton layout

Added Thysto

Added Aurelia

Revamped starting message

  • Legacy starting message is available still, don't worry! It's the 2nd one, right before the MYOS intro.

UPDATE FORECAST
